01 · About

A little about me

I'm a Computer Engineering graduate from Numl university Islamabad , Pakistan, currently building experience at the intersection of Image processing, cybersecurity, and data science. Over the past year I've completed three consecutive internships — moving from QA processes, to security fundamentals, to applied machine learning — while co-authoring two publications on ML-driven requirements engineering and integrative AI systems. I care about building things that are both technically sound and genuinely useful, and I'm always looking for the next interesting problem to work on.
